_comment: Copy this file to routing.json and adjust to match your team structure. Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom — first match wins. A rule matches when all present conditions (intake_type, priority) match the issue. Omit a condition to match any value.

rules._comment: P0/P1 incidents go to the dedicated incident response channel
Lower-severity incidents handled by standard engineering
P0 tasks escalate to founders for immediate visibility
Proposals require founder review before execution
Decisions are logged with founder visibility
Meeting summaries are async operational work
Catch-all fallback for any unmatched type
